title: [FIRRTL] Handle RegReset as index to SubAccess

features.name: reset register used as dynamic array index
features.description: Code should include a register with async reset whose value is used as the index operand of a dynamic (variable-index) array access, exercising reset inference through the index path of a SubAccess-equivalent construct

features.name: sync reset register as dynamic vector index
features.description: Code should include a register with synchronous reset whose post-reset value is used as the index into a packed or unpacked vector, so that reset-type inference must propagate through the index operand of the access

features.name: variable-index unpacked array read (SubAccess equivalent)
features.description: Code should include a dynamic (variable) index read from an unpacked array where the index is a register rather than a constant, equivalent to FIRRTL SubAccess with a non-literal index operand
